# plot_cohort_attrition { #cdmconnector.plot_cohort_attrition }

```python
plot_cohort_attrition(result, *, show=('subjects', 'records'))
```

Plot cohort attrition as a flow diagram.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                        | Description   | Default                   |
|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|---------------------------|
| result | SummarisedResult from summarise_cohort_attrition.           |               | _required_                |
| show   | Which metrics to display (\"subjects\" and/or \"records\"). |               | `('subjects', 'records')` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                     | Description   |
|--------|--------------------------|---------------|
|        | matplotlib.figure.Figure |               |
